HardyTheorem.name: integral_asymptotic_target
HardyTheorem.shape: n ≥ 1 ∧ ∃ A>0, weightedIntegral n ~[atTop] (fun T => ((-1)^n*A) * T ^ ((2*n)+1/4))

HardyTheorem.name: gamma_asymptotic_half_plus_it_target
HardyTheorem.shape: (fun t => Gamma(1/2 + I*t)) ~ (sqrt(2π) * exp(I*t*log t - I*t) * exp(-π*t/2))

HardyTheorem.name: theta_asymptotic_target
HardyTheorem.shape: ∃θ, exp(I*θ t)=exp(I*thetaPhase t) ∧ (fun t => θ t) ~ (t/2*log(t/(2π))-t/2-π/8)

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: PNTForm1
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: Tendsto (fun x => (primeCounting x:ℝ)*log x / x) atTop (𝓝 1)

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: PNTForm3
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: Tendsto (fun x => chebyshevPsi x / x) atTop (𝓝 1)

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: RH_PsiErrorBound
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: (fun x => chebyshevPsi x - x) =O[atTop] (fun x => sqrt x * (log x)^2)

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: RH_ThetaErrorBound
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: (fun x => Chebyshev.theta x - x) =O[atTop] (fun x => sqrt x * (log x)^2)

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: RH_PrimeCountingLiErrorBound
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: (fun x => (primeCounting x:ℝ)-logIntegral x) =O[atTop] (fun x => sqrt x * log x)

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: explicit_formula_von_mangoldt
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: Tendsto (T ↦ explicitFormulaApprox x T) atTop (𝓝 (chebyshevPsi0 x))
